title: Explosive Sulfur
description: Sulfur cubes now explode on impact if they have tnt inside >:D
body:
---

**This Pack** changes sulfur cubes so they explode on impact if they have tnt inside >:D

It is recommended to use this datapack with [Faster Ghastlings Pack](https://modrinth.com/datapack/faster-ghastlings) that makes happy ghasts slightly faster.

**Changes**
* Sulfur cubes now explodes on impact.

You can contact me directly if you have any questions or need help:
[https://proficode.is-a.dev/](https://proficode.is-a.dev/)

Special thanks to [Minecraft Commands](https://discord.gg/QAFXFtZ)! They're a community centred around vanilla Minecraft commands and mapmaking
